nasb.text: And seeing the man who had been healed standing with them, they had nothing to say in reply.

esv.text: But seeing the man who was healed standing beside them, they had nothing to say in opposition.

cnv.text: 又看見那醫好了的人，和他們一同站著，就沒有話可辯駁。

ccb.text: 又见那被医好的瘸子站在他们旁边，便无话可说，

csbs.text: 又看见那得了痊愈的人和他们一同站着，就无话可说了，
